_comment: Generic template — copy to config/clients/<client_slug>/icp_checklist.json and replace these placeholder signals with real ICP signals for the engagement. Run with: --icp config/clients/<client_slug>/icp_checklist.json

signals.prompt_instruction: <Question Claude answers to confirm this signal — e.g. 'Does this practice explicitly list [key service] on their website?'>
signals.note: Replace with your primary must-have signal. Set required_for_bullseye: true for signals whose absence should cap the tier.

signals.prompt_instruction: <Question Claude answers to detect a disqualifying condition — e.g. 'Is this practice affiliated with a hospital or health system?'>
signals.note: Negative weight. Replace with your primary friction/exclusion signal. Triggers exclusion rule when signal_state is yes.
